text: add to my knowledge base that we spent two years in Costa Rica with the whole family and I love Costa Rica so much particularly we lived in Bahia Bayena in Yuvita which is in the South Pacific area of Costa Rica and we surfed at Playa Chamon did lots of adventures as a family spent a lot of time walking at the beach rented our house on Airbnb the whole time in Richmond but and also rented Airbnb houses in Costa Rica had a nanny lots of date nights I wrote a motorcycle I did ayahuasca
